item.name: Red Baron Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near the Red Baron suit of magitek armor will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Red Baron
mount.action: Call into battle the Red Baron─Nero tol Scaeva's custom-made battle armor, now <Emphasis>your</Emphasis> custom-made battle armor.
mount.description: Constantly modified and improved by Nero himself, this warmachina of Garlean construct barely resembles the suit issued to tol Scaeva on the day of his promotion to tribunus.
mount.tooltip:
That mechanical monstrosity represented
a feat of engineering far beyond aught
Garlemald can presently achieve.
- Cid
